label: Beard
description: Defines a beard style for humanlike pawns. Inherits shared style item fields and adds optional narrow-head render offsets.

offsetNarrowEast.label: Narrow east offset
offsetNarrowEast.description: Additional render offset for narrow head types when facing east. West-facing pawns mirror the X component at runtime.

offsetNarrowSouth.label: Narrow south offset
offsetNarrowSouth.description: Additional render offset for narrow head types when facing south.

basic-beard.label: Basic beard
basic-beard.description: Beard style with a texture, gender restriction, category, and style tags.

no-graphic-beard.label: No-graphic beard
no-graphic-beard.description: Beard style with no texture, used for the no-beard slot (e.g., NoBeard).

narrow-head-adjusted-beard.label: Narrow-head adjusted beard
narrow-head-adjusted-beard.description: Beard style with additional render offsets for narrow head types.
